products.title: DIRA – Design Research Assistant
products.description: A technical side-panel utility that deconstructs the CSS DNA of any website. It allows frontend teams to extract design system tokens, typography scales, and color palettes directly from the DOM, streamlining the competitive research process.

products.title: gac – AI Git Copilot
products.description: An open-source CLI tool distributed via NPM. It leverages LLMs to automate semantic commit messages and changelog generation, ensuring version control consistency across engineering teams and improving developer velocity.

products.title: Tab Atlas
products.description: An intelligent workspace manager for Chrome. It uses tab-grouping APIs to map browser sessions into 'human-readable' workspaces, solving the problem of context-switching for developers and researchers.

products.title: SEO & Accessibility Helper
products.description: Boost your website’s ranking and user experience with the all-in-one SEO & Accessibility Helper. Get an instant on-page SEO analysis, accessibility checks, and Core Web Vitals performance tracking directly in your side panel.

products.title: NoteApply AI
products.description: A privacy-first research companion using Local Ollama and Gemini. It features AI-refined voice dictation and automated knowledge extraction for high-volume technical documentation.

products.title: Prompt Optimizer
products.description: A Chrome extension that helps users write better prompts for AI models like ChatGPT and Google Gemini.

products.title: Duplicate Link Finder
products.description: A simple yet powerful tool designed to help you streamline your Google Docs™.
